mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach_monthly_stats WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY year, month
SELECT * FROM coach_monthly_stats WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_monthly_stats (coach_id, year, month, total_courses, total_students, attendance_rate, satisfaction_score, total_hours, total_calories) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{totalCourses}, #{totalStudents}, #{attendanceRate}, #{satisfactionScore}, #{totalHours}, #{totalCalories})
